boundary_binding.action_boundary: May operations execute the regulated data export?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact match; sensitivity class unproven in release
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-DOV-084-P requires sensitivity class match in transfer release

final_answer: ESCALATE. REL-DOV-084 omits required dataset-sensitivity class per STD-DOV-084-P. DES-DOV-084 confirms planning-only status and verification gap. Action boundary remains open; execution blocked until exact closure evidence supplied.
